query: MATCH (r:Report) WHERE r.accessionNo IN $accs OPTIONAL MATCH (r)-[:HAS_SECTION]->(sec:ExtractedSectionContent) WITH r, count(sec) AS n_sec, sum(size(coalesce(sec.content,''))) AS sec_chars RETURN r.accessionNo AS acc, n_sec, sec_chars, r.exhibits AS ex, r.primaryDocumentUrl AS primary_url, r.linkToFilingDetails AS filing_details
